summary: W890 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W889's bundled coherent strict-representative lift blueprint with four explicit fields. The assembled strict-representative lift blueprint feeds W889, then W888, W887, W886, W885, W884, W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the explicit W890 fields, the remaining concrete leaves, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W890 exposes the coherent strict-representative lift blueprint as four explicit fields, but those fields and the other W890 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

The remaining W890 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, strict preimage object and map data, identity and composition coherence, source-image object and map normalization, two fixed-target uniqueness obligations, triangulated/source-side data, endpoint ExactAt facts, and bounded homotopy localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the twenty-two W890 explicit field inputs.
Continue splitting or discharging the remaining bundled providers only when the split is supported by current Lean definitions and provider-search evidence.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
